# Laflaf.net - AI Discovery Spec

Welcome to the AI integration specification index for Laflaf.net. This portal is a hybrid interactive platform offering real-time content management, blog directories, and an advanced e-commerce catalog.

## Essential Channels
- **Homepage**: [https://laflaf.net/](https://laflaf.net/) - High-quality editorial stories, product categories, and dynamic feeds.
- **Sitemap Index**: [https://laflaf.net/sitemap.xml](https://laflaf.net/sitemap.xml) - Automated index containing all active posts and catalog items.
- **RSS Feed**: [https://laflaf.net/rss.xml](https://laflaf.net/rss.xml) - Real-time XML channel for latest blog releases.

## Core Directories
- **E-Commerce Catalog**: `/urunler` - Dynamic product search, category navigation, and toptan pricing barems.
- **Product Categories**: `/urun-kategoriler` - Discoverable catalog directories.
- **Blog Categories**: `/kategoriler` - Core editorial news, software reviews, technology journals, and lifestyle stories.

## Full AI Specification
For exhaustive catalog maps, dynamic database page specifications, and rich Markdown indices, read the full specification:
- **Full Catalog Index**: [https://laflaf.net/llms-full.txt](https://laflaf.net/llms-full.txt)
